summary: A vertical produced clip with large burned-in white text on each shot. It opens on a glitch-styled title reading ICE TARGETED ENFORCEMENT OPERATION over a mountainous background, cuts to a dark nighttime view from inside a vehicle with distant headlights captioned STAKEOUT BEGINS, and ends on a close shot of a person in a blue shirt whose hands are cuffed behind their back, captioned SUBJECT WILL REMAIN IN ICE CUSTODY PENDING REMOVAL.

script.scene: Glitch-styled title reading ICE TARGETED ENFORCEMENT OPERATION over a mountainous background.
A dark nighttime view from inside a vehicle with distant headlights, captioned STAKEOUT BEGINS.
A close shot of a handcuffed person in a blue shirt, captioned SUBJECT WILL REMAIN IN ICE CUSTODY PENDING REMOVAL.

notable_text: ICE TARGETED ENFORCEMENT OPERATION; STAKEOUT BEGINS; SUBJECT WILL REMAIN IN ICE CUSTODY PENDING REMOVAL
